description: Allocate or modify a sub-quota for a specific workspace and quota dimension. Rejects if the new allocation would cause the total across all workspaces in the tenant to exceed the tenant's effective limit for that dimension.

allocatedValue.description: Finite non-negative integer; -1 is not permitted at workspace level

actor.description: Identifier of the requesting actor for audit

changed.description: false if value was already equal to requested value (no-op)

errors.description: Actor cannot manage sub-quotas for that tenant/workspace
Allocation would cause total workspace sub-quotas to exceed tenant's effective limit for this dimension
Serializable lock acquisition timed out; caller should retry
